chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Prohibition of Hunting in the Sanctuary and Its Rulings

text: 2377 - وَ سَأَلَ سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ اَلْأَعْرَجُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ بَيْضَةِ نَعَامَةٍ أَكَلْتُ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ فَقَالَ «تَصَدَّقْ بِثَمَنِهَا ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2377 - Sa'id ibn Abdullah Al-A'raj asked Abu Abdullah (as) about an ostrich egg that he ate while in the Haram.
Imam (as) replied: "Give in charity the equivalent of its price."
